prompts: Cinematic Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, Yuna Silverbrook (androgynous guild coordinator in formal cloak) and Yuna Mistfell (masculine guild crafter in rolled-sleeve apron); Yuna Silverbrook steadies a shield on the workbench while Yuna Mistfell guides a safe repair tool, cooperative hands, warm forge light, no sparks hitting skin, no text, no watermark.
